_note: Per-repository Project v2 board config for LFX Mentorship proposal intake. Keyed by GITHUB_REPOSITORY (owner/repo). Only the Project v2 node ID is stored here; the board-sync steps resolve the Status field ID and per-column option IDs live from the board at run time, so dev (fork) and prod (cncf/mentoring) run identical workflow code. The board's Status column NAMES must match the lifecycle stages used by the workflows. See ADMIN_GUIDE.md > Board configuration.
